title: Mandatory reporting
doc_html:
§1019.4. Mandatory reporting

            If, at any time during the application process or subsequent hiring of an employee or independent contractor, an operator of a sexually oriented business believes that the potential employee, employee, or independent contractor may be a victim of human trafficking, he shall, as soon as possible, but within twenty-four hours, contact law enforcement or call the National Human Trafficking Resource Center Hotline to coordinate with local resources.

            Acts 2018, No. 703, §1.
doc_text:
§1019.4. Mandatory reporting
If, at any time during the application process or subsequent hiring of an employee or
independent contractor, an operator of a sexually oriented business believes that the potential
employee, employee, or independent contractor may be a victim of human trafficking, he
shall, as soon as possible, but within twenty-four hours, contact law enforcement or call the
National Human Trafficking Resource Center Hotline to coordinate with local resources.
Acts 2018, No. 703, §1.
